---
title: "Prenatal and childhood exposure to mixtures of environmental chemicals and adolescence attentional problems: a triangulation study"
date: 2025-01-01
author:
  - name: Lorenzo Fabbri
    orcid: 0000-0003-3031-322X
    affiliation: ISGlobal, Universitat Pompeu Fabra
categories:
  - Causal Inference
  - Environmental Epidemiology
  - Endocrine Disruptors
  - Neurodevelopment
  - Mixtures
pub-info:
  reference: >-
    <strong>Fabbri L</strong>, Andru&#353;aityt&#279; S, Basaga&ntilde;a X, Bhopal S, Bustamante M, Cheung RW, Gra&#382;ulevi&#269;ien&#279; R, Guxens M, Kadawathagedara M, Kampouri M, et al. "Prenatal and childhood exposure to mixtures of environmental chemicals and adolescence attentional problems: a triangulation study." <em>Environment International</em> 206 (2025): 109927, doi: <a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.envint.2025.109927"><code>10.1016/j.envint.2025.109927</code></a>
  links:
    - name: Final version
      url: https://doi.org/10.1016/j.envint.2025.109927
      icon: fa-solid fa-scroll
    - name: Code
      url: https://github.com/lorenzoFabbri/paper-athlete-neuro
      icon: fa-brands fa-github
    - name: Add to Zotero
      url: https://www.zotero.org/save?type=doi&q=10.1016/j.envint.2025.109927
      icon: ai ai-zotero
doi: 10.1016/j.envint.2025.109927
---

## Abstract

Available at the [journal website](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.envint.2025.109927).

## Important links

- [Published version](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.envint.2025.109927)
- [Code repository](https://github.com/lorenzoFabbri/paper-athlete-neuro)

## BibTeX citation

```bibtex
@article{fabbri2025prenatal,
  title={Prenatal and childhood exposure to mixtures of environmental chemicals and adolescence attentional problems: a triangulation study},
  author={Fabbri, Lorenzo and Andru{\v{s}}aityt{\.{e}}, Sandra and Basaga{\~n}a, Xavier and Bhopal, Sunil and Bustamante, Mariona and Cheung, Rachael W. and Gra{\v{z}}ulevi{\v{c}}ien{\.{e}}, Regina and Guxens, M{\`o}nica and Kadawathagedara, Manik and Kampouri, Mariza and others},
  journal={Environment International},
  volume={206},
  pages={109927},
  year={2025},
  publisher={Elsevier BV}
}
```
